title: [FIRRTL] Verifier Should Reject External Modules with Input Probes

features.name: extmodule with input probe port
features.description: Code should include an extmodule declaration with an input port that has a Probe type

features.name: extmodule with input probe in bundle
features.description: Code should include an extmodule with an input port containing a nested Probe type in a bundle

features.name: extmodule with input probe array
features.description: Code should include an extmodule with an input port that is an array of Probe types

features.name: extmodule with flip output probe in bundle
features.description: Code should include an extmodule with an output port that has flip direction on a Probe in a bundle (legal construct)
features.snippet:
extmodule Bar:
  output b: {flip a: Probe<UInt<1>>}
